diagnosis.root_cause: Tailscale VPN disconnected — the company server is unreachable
reasoning: ping to the server gets no response
local system is idle (cpu 12%) — the app isn't the problem, the path to it is

alternative_hypotheses.hypothesis: Express process crashed on the server
alternative_hypotheses.why_less_likely: we cannot even resolve/route to the host; a crashed app would still answer DNS and refuse the port from a reachable host

impact.business_impact: Sistema RH totalmente inacessivel remotamente; sem copia local do banco

actions.estimated_impact: Restores routing to the company server
actions.implementation: tailscale up ; tailscale status  (or click Tailscale in the Windows tray -> Connect)

actions.action: If still offline, restart the Tailscale service
